title: Unexpected Crash
description:
Dear MonetDB Developers,
I came across an unexpected execution result in MonetDB. Whenever convenient, it would mean a lot if you could take a look. I sincerely appreciate your efforts in continuously improving MonetDB’s robustness.
```sql
SELECT (COALESCE(((VALUES (1)))));
-- unexpected end of file

```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_table (id, value) VALUES (1, 'test'), (2, NULL), (3, 'example');
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE id = 2), 'default') AS result;
SELECT COALESCE((SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table), 'no values') AS max_value;
key_bug_features: COALESCE with VALUES causes unexpected end of file
